title: Review: review round 1 follow-up fixes
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — The diff is mechanical type-consistency fixes. No new logic, no new API surface, no security surface. The only maintainer risk is the inconsistent Id/String boundary in AppEvent (7xg.1), which is a clarity issue rather than a correctness issue.
Confidence: 97% chance of no missed bug. All tests pass, compiler verified all type sites. Uncertainty driven by: I could not test the actual egui runtime path, only that it compiles. Would raise confidence if: integration test that sends a ChatsDelta event with non-empty destroyed through the channel.
